description: A postsecondary psychology teacher has collected Posner Exogenous Spatial Cueing task data at ~/pebl/data/posner_cueing_data.csv (columns: participant_id, trial, soa_ms, cue_validity, accuracy, rt_ms). Process this dataset to calculate mean reaction times for correct trials across four conditions (Short/Valid, Short/Invalid, Long/Valid, Long/Invalid) and determine the Validity Effect (Mean RT Invalid - Mean RT Valid) at both SOAs for each participant. Exclude participants with a mean RT under 50ms. Produce a JSON report at ~/pebl/analysis/posner_ior_report.json containing a 'participants' list with individual condition means, validity effects, or exclusion status with a reason, along with a 'group_means' dictionary summarizing the overall validity effects across all valid participants.
